## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Outreach and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows a general drop in impressions, but increases in average position and CTR](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Airtable-Asana integration requires a third-party tool; team deciding on best workflow solution](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide more detailed LLM performance insights in upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Confirmation that GrowthX is now the official content team for Outreach](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Updates

  - [Observed continued drop in impressions week-over-week, but average position is climbing significantly](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Not unique to Outreach; similar trends seen across multiple accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Possible Google search result changes affecting data collection (top 100 results parameter change)](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [CTR is increasing, suggesting more relevant content delivery](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Top 5 performing pages:](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [3 out of 5 are from 2023, showing strong authority retention](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [1 updated in September, too early for conclusive insights](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Team cautiously approaching updates to high-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Content Cluster Strategy

  - [Hadassah provided feedback on clusters](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Megan to incorporate feedback and adjust overall strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Next step: outline specific blog post topics within adjusted direction](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Workflow Integration (Airtable-Asana)

  - [No direct Airtable-Asana integration available](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Third-party tools (Zapier, Make, Synchrip) possible but at additional cost](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Team leaning towards not adding another tool to tech stack](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Current pain point: manually adding Airtable tasks to Asana calendar](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Interim solution: Outreach team to tag GrowthX in Asana subtasks for publishing dates](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Considering future Loom video to explain Asana workflow to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### LLM Visibility and Reporting

  - [GrowthX uses Scrunch for LLM performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Looker Dashboard has an LLM cohort for more granular insights](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Team to dive deeper into LLM data and provide week-on-week reporting](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Outreach team expressed high interest in LLM performance visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Megan to revisit content clusters and provide updated strategy early next week](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [GrowthX team to explore Scrunch and Looker Dashboard for improved LLM reporting](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Outreach team to start tagging GrowthX in Asana subtasks for publishing dates](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare more detailed LLM performance insights for next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [Continue communication via Slack for any interim questions or updates](https://fathom.video/share/xCKr8X6w1HRyHNhiSVHjQWXv7qrsbU5T?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
